no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested artifact-type panel work already exists in this worktree, but the frontend unit gate is blocked by an unrelated pre-existing failure in `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts:65` (`expect(graphSource).not.toMatch(/stroke-opacity/)`). The bead instructions prohibit widening scope into unrelated files, so I cannot complete the required `bun run test` / commit contract without either resolving that separate failure or explicitly expanding scope.

evidence:
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/ArtifactTypePanel.svelte:1-181` renders the tabbed panel, selector dropdown, and `?typeDef=` round-trip behavior.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/artifactTypePanel.ts:1-64` defines the tab labels, collision handling, selected-definition lookup, and URL update helper.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/artifactTypePanel.test.ts:37-57` covers single-definition selection, collision keys, and `typeDef` query-string round-tripping.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/[artifactId]/+page.svelte:17,276-280` already integrates `ArtifactTypePanel` into the artifact detail view when `typeDefinitions` are present.
- `bun run test:unit -- --run` fails before completion because of the unrelated `D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts` assertion above.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passes only as a no-op in this clean worktree because no files are staged.
